# Hash verification

Tests for hash generation, preservation, and verification during dependency resolution.

## Hash generation

### Generate hashes from registry

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_registry -->

Generate hashes for packages from the default registry.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==4.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Generate hashes from source distribution URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_source_distribution_url -->

Generate hashes from a source distribution URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/2d/b8/7333d87d5f03247215d86a86362fd3e324111788c6cdd8d2e6196a6ba833/anyio-4.2.0.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/2d/b8/7333d87d5f03247215d86a86362fd3e324111788c6cdd8d2e6196a6ba833/anyio-4.2.0.tar.gz \
    --hash=sha256:e1875bb4b4e2de1669f4bc7869b6d3f54231cdced71605e6e64c9be77e3be50f
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Generate hashes from built distribution URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_built_distribution_url -->

Generate hashes from a wheel URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
```

### Generate hashes with git dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_git -->

```toml
[test]
required-features = ["git"]
```

Given a VCS dependency, include hashes for its dependencies, but not the repository itself.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio @ git+https://github.com/agronholm/anyio@4.3.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
anyio @ git+https://github.com/agronholm/anyio@437a7e310925a962cab4a58fcd2455fbcd578d51
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Generate hashes for unnamed URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_unnamed_url -->

Given an unnamed URL, include hashes for the URL and its dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/14/fd/2f20c40b45e4fb4324834aea24bd4afdf1143390242c0b33774da0e2e34f/anyio-4.3.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0

anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/14/fd/2f20c40b45e4fb4324834aea24bd4afdf1143390242c0b33774da0e2e34f/anyio-4.3.0-py3-none-any.whl \
    --hash=sha256:048e05d0f6caeed70d731f3db756d35dcc1f35747c8c403364a8332c630441b8
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
```

### Generate hashes for local directory

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_local_directory -->

Given a local directory, include hashes for its dependencies, but not the directory itself.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
../../packages/poetry_editable
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in --generate-hashes
anyio==4.3.0 \
    --hash=sha256:048e05d0f6caeed70d731f3db756d35dcc1f35747c8c403364a8332c630441b8 \
    --hash=sha256:f75253795a87df48568485fd18cdd2a3fa5c4f7c5be8e5e36637733fce06fed6
    # via poetry-editable
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
../../packages/poetry_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Generate hashes for editable

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_editable -->

Given an editable dependency, include hashes for its dependencies, but not the directory itself.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e ../../packages/poetry_editable
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0

#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in --generate-hashes
-e ../../packages/poetry_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
anyio==4.3.0 \
    --hash=sha256:048e05d0f6caeed70d731f3db756d35dcc1f35747c8c403364a8332c630441b8 \
    --hash=sha256:f75253795a87df48568485fd18cdd2a3fa5c4f7c5be8e5e36637733fce06fed6
    # via poetry-editable
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
```

### Generate hashes from find-links directory

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_find_links_directory -->

Include hashes from a `--find-links` index in the generated output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes --find-links ../../links
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
tqdm==1000.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:a34996d4bd5abb2336e14ff0a2d22b92cfd0f0ed344e6883041ce01953276a13
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Generate hashes from find-links URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::generate_hashes_find_links_url -->

Include hashes from a `--find-links` URL index.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes --no-index --find-links https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes --no-index
tqdm==4.64.1 \
    --hash=sha256:6fee160d6ffcd1b1c68c65f14c829c22832bc401726335ce92c52d395944a6a1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Hash preservation

### Preserve hashes without upgrade

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::preserve_hashes_no_upgrade -->

`--generate-hashes` should preserve the hashes in the existing lockfile when `--upgrade` is not
specified.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
markupsafe
```

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12 --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR]
markupsafe==2.1.2 \
    --hash=sha256:0576fe974b40a400449768941d5d0858cc624e3249dfd1e0c33674e5c7ca7aed \
    --hash=sha256:085fd3201e7b12809f9e6e9bc1e5c96a368c8523fad5afb02afe3c051ae4afcc \
    --hash=sha256:090376d812fb6ac5f171e5938e82e7f2d7adc2b629101cec0db8b267815c85e2
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
markupsafe==2.1.2 \
    --hash=sha256:0576fe974b40a400449768941d5d0858cc624e3249dfd1e0c33674e5c7ca7aed \
    --hash=sha256:085fd3201e7b12809f9e6e9bc1e5c96a368c8523fad5afb02afe3c051ae4afcc \
    --hash=sha256:090376d812fb6ac5f171e5938e82e7f2d7adc2b629101cec0db8b267815c85e2
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Update hashes on upgrade

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::preserve_hashes_upgrade -->

`--generate-hashes` should update the hashes in the lockfile if `--upgrade` is specified.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
markupsafe==2.1.2
```

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12 --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR]
markupsafe==2.1.2 \
    --hash=sha256:0576fe974b40a400449768941d5d0858cc624e3249dfd1e0c33674e5c7ca7aed \
    --hash=sha256:085fd3201e7b12809f9e6e9bc1e5c96a368c8523fad5afb02afe3c051ae4afcc \
    --hash=sha256:090376d812fb6ac5f171e5938e82e7f2d7adc2b629101cec0db8b267815c85e2
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes --upgrade
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
```

### Add hashes when none exist

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::preserve_hashes_no_existing_hashes -->

`--generate-hashes` should add hashes if the lockfile has no hashes, even without `--upgrade`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
markupsafe
```

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12 --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR]
markupsafe==2.1.2
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
markupsafe==2.1.2 \
```

### Update hashes on version change

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::preserve_hashes_newer_version -->

`--generate-hashes` should update hashes when the package version changes due to requirements.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
markupsafe==2.1.3
```

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12 --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR]
markupsafe==2.1.2 \
    --hash=sha256:0576fe974b40a400449768941d5d0858cc624e3249dfd1e0c33674e5c7ca7aed \
    --hash=sha256:085fd3201e7b12809f9e6e9bc1e5c96a368c8523fad5afb02afe3c051ae4afcc \
    --hash=sha256:090376d812fb6ac5f171e5938e82e7f2d7adc2b629101cec0db8b267815c85e2
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt --generate-hashes
```

## Require hashes (strict mode)

### Basic require hashes

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes -->

Install packages with `--require-hashes` - all packages must have valid hashes.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Require hashes with build dependencies

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_build_dependencies -->

Use `--require-hashes` when building from source - build dependencies don't require hashes.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install --no-binary :all: -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Require hashes with no-deps

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_no_deps -->

Omit hashes for dependencies with `--require-hashes`, which is allowed with `--no-deps`.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
```

### Hash mismatch error

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_mismatch -->

Provide the wrong hash with `--require-hashes` - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:afdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:a7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
  × Failed to download `anyio==4.0.0`
  ╰─▶ Hash mismatch for `anyio==4.0.0`

      Expected:
        sha256:afdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
        sha256:a7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a

      Computed:
        sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

### Missing dependency error

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_missing_dependency -->

Omit a transitive dependency in `--require-hashes` - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
werkzeug==3.0.0 --hash=sha256:cbb2600f7eabe51dbc0502f58be0b3e1b96b893b05695ea2b35b43d4de2d9962
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must be pinned upfront with `==`, but found: `markupsafe`
```

### Editable not allowed

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_editable -->

Editables are disallowed with `--require-hashes`.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
-e file://[WORKSPACE]/test/packages/black_editable[d]
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must have a hash, but none were provided for: file://[WORKSPACE]/test/packages/black_editable[d]
```

### Hash from constraint file

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_constraint -->

If a hash is only included as a constraint, that's good enough for `--require-hashes`.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes -c constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
```

### Constraint hash without pinned version

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_constraint (variant 2) -->

Include the hash in requirements but pin the version only in constraints - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio==4.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes -c constraints.txt
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must have their versions pinned with `==`, but found: anyio
```

### Conflicting hashes error

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_constraint (variant 3) -->

Include non-overlapping hashes between requirements and constraints - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:afdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes -c constraints.txt
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must have a hash, but there were no overlapping hashes between the requirements and constraints for: anyio==4.0.0
```

### Matching hashes in both files

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_constraint (variant 4) -->

Include the right hash in both requirements and constraints - should succeed.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes -c constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
```

### Constraint with extra hash

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_constraint (variant 5) -->

Include the right hash in both files, with an extra (wrong) hash in constraints - should succeed.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f --hash=sha256:afdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-hashes -c constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
```

### Unnamed URL with hash

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_unnamed -->

Allow `--require-hashes` for unnamed URL dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/55/ad4de788d84a630656ece71059665e01ca793c04294c463fd84132f40fe6/anyio-4.0.0-py3-none-any.whl --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0 (from https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/55/ad4de788d84a630656ece71059665e01ca793c04294c463fd84132f40fe6/anyio-4.0.0-py3-none-any.whl)
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Repeated unnamed URL

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_unnamed_repeated -->

Allow `--require-hashes` for unnamed URL dependencies that repeat a registered package.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/55/ad4de788d84a630656ece71059665e01ca793c04294c463fd84132f40fe6/anyio-4.0.0-py3-none-any.whl --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0 (from https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/55/ad4de788d84a630656ece71059665e01ca793c04294c463fd84132f40fe6/anyio-4.0.0-py3-none-any.whl)
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Override hash not accepted

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_override -->

If a hash is only included as an override, that's not good enough for `--require-hashes`.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes --override overrides.txt
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must have a hash, but none were provided for: anyio==4.0.0
```

### Override with unpinned version

<!-- from pip_install.rs::require_hashes_override (variant 2) -->

Include the hash in requirements but pin the version only in override - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```toml overrides.txt
anyio==4.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --require-hashes --override overrides.txt
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: In `--require-hashes` mode, all requirements must have their versions pinned with `==`, but found: anyio
```

## Verify hashes (lenient mode)

### Basic verify hashes

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes -->

Install packages with `--verify-hashes` - verifies hashes where provided.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:f7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --verify-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Verify hashes without pinned version

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_missing_version -->

Omit a pinned version with `--verify-hashes` - allowed, hash just ignored.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio \
    --hash=sha256:afdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f \
    --hash=sha256:a7ed51751b2c2add651e5747c891b47e26d2a21be5d32d9311dfe9692f3e5d7a
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
    # via anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --verify-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.3.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Verify hashes mismatch

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_mismatch -->

Provide the wrong hash with `--verify-hashes` - should fail.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
```

```console
$ uv pip install --no-deps -r requirements.txt --verify-hashes
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
  × Failed to download `idna==3.6`
  ╰─▶ Hash mismatch for `idna==3.6`

      Expected:
        sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2
        sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc

      Computed:
        sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
```

### Disable verify hashes

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_mismatch (variant 2) -->

Use `--no-verify-hashes` to ignore mismatched hashes.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:2f6da418d1f1e0fddd844478f41680e794e6051915791a034ff65e5f100525a2 \
    --hash=sha256:f4324edc670a0f49750a81b895f35c3adb843cca46f0530f79fc1babb23789dc
```

```console
$ uv pip install --no-deps -r requirements.txt --no-verify-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + idna==3.6
```

### Verify hashes match

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_match -->

Provide the correct hash - verifies without explicit flag.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
idna==3.6 \
    --hash=sha256:9ecdbbd083b06798ae1e86adcbfe8ab1479cf864e4ee30fe4e46a003d12491ca \
    --hash=sha256:c05567e9c24a6b9faaa835c4821bad0590fbb9d5779e7caa6e1cc4978e7eb24f
```

```console
$ uv pip install --no-deps -r requirements.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + idna==3.6
```

### Verify hashes allows missing dependencies

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_omit_dependency -->

Omit a transitive dependency in `--verify-hashes` - allowed.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==4.0.0 --hash=sha256:cfdb2b588b9fc25ede96d8db56ed50848b0b649dca3dd1df0b11f683bb9e0b5f
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --verify-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==4.0.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Verify hashes allows editables

<!-- from pip_install.rs::verify_hashes_editable -->

Allow `--verify-hashes` for editable dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
-e file://[WORKSPACE]/test/packages/black_editable[d]
```

